label: Active learning & curriculum learning

node.label: Active learning & curriculum learning
node.definition: The learner chooses informative data or follows an ordered progression from easier to harder experience.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Active learning & curriculum learning is to connect Supervised learning, Datasets, sampling & splits to downstream capabilities including Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules, AutoML & automated model design.
examples: substrate for Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules
substrate for AutoML & automated model design
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Datasets, sampling & splits.

dependencies.rationale: Active learning & curriculum learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
Active learning & curriculum learning uses Datasets, sampling & splits as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Active learning & curriculum learning uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
